name: Sri Lankan Omelette
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Chop the onion, chilli, and curry leaves.
3. Mix the chopped onion, chilli, curry leaves, salt, black pepper, and cornflour into the beaten eggs.
4. Heat the oil in a pan.
5. When the oil is hot, pour in half of the egg mixture.
6. Cook for a couple of minutes.
7. Carefully turn over and cook the other side.
8. Make another omelette with the remaining mixture.
